fidelite.extra: Plus other gifts all along your loyalty journey!

pizzas.label: Pizzas
pizzas.heading: Our Pizzas
pizzas.subtitle: At Girafou, quality comes first! Our dishes are prepared on site with love. Our chicken can be halal on request, respecting our customers' dietary choices and preferences.
pizzas.highlightText: Pizza of your choice + a jug of squash of your choice

helicoptere.cardDesc: Exclusive in Normandy — climb aboard a real helicopter and fly over the park.
description: Come and fly above the park! A few turns of the pedals and you're off on a ride 5 metres up. An attraction for the bravest only!
And if you fancy it, mum or dad can even climb aboard for a ride with you.
helicoptere.ageDetail: Children under 5 must be accompanied by an adult.
rules: Children under 5 must be accompanied by an adult.
Keep your arms inside the cabin during the ride.

neoxperience.cardDesc: The ground-breaking interactive wall that mixes video games and sport for a whole new thrill.
description: A real life-size games console! A play area unlike any other in the region, built around its interactive wall.
Come and take on your friends, or even your parents… We'll soon see who's best. See you very soon!
rules: Open all day, except during Girafou's Big Party (12pm & 2pm).

grandeFete.title: Girafou's Big Party
grandeFete.intro: Every day, children love Girafou's Big Party — an unmissable festive moment that takes place in the NeoXperience area!
grandeFete.body: For 15 minutes, the children enjoy a high-energy show with music, a foam blast and a host getting everyone going on the mic. Laughter, dancing and good vibes all round, to make their visit even more memorable.
grandeFete.outro: A free show that makes children's eyes light up and turns their day at Girafou into an unforgettable memory!

karting.cardDesc: Drive your own kart or bike around the track — for budding little racers!
description: A taste of freedom and thrills: come and ride like an American biker on our bikes and karts!
You don't have to be big to dream and get away… Off on an adventure!
karting.ageDetail: Adults can ride along with the little ones on a bike or a kart.
rules: Follow the direction of the arrows around the track.

trampolines.cardDesc: XXL trampolines for spectacular jumps and hours of airborne fun.
description: Trampolines for jumping higher and higher! Take on the challenge and try to bounce higher than Girafou's head.
rules: To avoid bumps: 1 child per trampoline.

gonflables.cardDesc: Giant mazes, bouncy castles and slides — adventure with a soft landing.
description: Several inflatable games to enjoy at any age: jump, slide, bounce…
Kilimanjaro and the mighty Serengeti are waiting just for you!
gonflables.ageDetail: Kilimanjaro from age 4 · Serengeti from age 6.
rules: Adults are not allowed on the inflatable games.

piscine-balles.cardDesc: Dive into an ocean of colourful balls — heaven for little explorers (2–6 years).
description: The star attraction, a favourite with every child! Come and roll, jump and play in our ball pits.
Hours of playful, joyful fun for everyone!
piscine-balles.ageDetail: Two pits: one for under-5s, one for over-4s.

zones-saut.cardDesc: Areas dedicated to jumping, with foam blocks, obstacles and climbing spaces.
description: Take the big jump! Our play structure has areas built for thrills, with safe zones so you can jump with complete confidence.
For little ones and big ones alike: come and defy the laws of gravity!

labyrinthes.cardDesc: Multi-level structures with secret tunnels, mystery passages and climbing spaces.
description: 200 m² of obstacles, climbing, sliding and hiding places…
Plus plenty of other games and activities for children, all of it 5 metres high!
labyrinthes.ageDetail: Children aged 2–4 are welcome too, accompanied by mum or dad, so the whole family can join in.

toboggan.cardDesc: Giant slides and indoor toboggans for full-speed descents!
description: For some brilliant sliding! Take your pick: our straight wave slide or the spiral slide…
And if you're still after a thrill, there's the roller toboggan!
rules: For the toboggan: remember to pick up your sledge before setting off down the rollers.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit to Girafou, near Caen.

a.t: Socks are COMPULSORY for your children, for reasons of hygiene and safety.
Girafou sells its own non-slip socks at €2.50 a pair. They are equally essential for adults who want to join the children on the equipment.

items.q: Can we bring our own snack or picnic?

a.t: No. Because of food safety regulations, you may not bring in food or drink from outside.
Our café is here for you on site: homemade pizzas, crêpes, waffles, ice creams and drinks.
→ See the menu
Baby food is permitted, as are special diets for children with food allergies.
Term time:
Wednesday, Saturday, Sunday and public holidays, 10.00am to 7.00pm.
School holidays:
Every day and public holidays, 10.00am to 7.00pm.
Summer holidays (July/August):
Every day and public holidays, 10.00am to 7.00pm.
Exceptional closing days:
Closed on 25 December and 1 January.

items.q: Do we need to book to visit Girafou?

a.t: No, except for birthday parties (see below) and groups (holiday clubs, associations, etc.).
Because of safety regulations, entry may be delayed during busy periods.
The busiest times are the afternoons during the October half-term, February, Easter and July/August school holidays.
As a rule, bad weather makes the park much busier.

items.q: Who pays what? And how long can we play for?

a.t: Girafou has a single price for “unlimited” play time.
Admission is charged for accompanying adults (€2 per adult, including 1 free drink).
→ Click here to see our prices

items.q: What do parents do while the children play?

a.t: Girafou is a FAMILY play park: parents are welcome (depending on how busy it is) to enjoy playtime alongside their children.
Free WiFi and magazines are available for parents.
The cafeteria is of course open to parents.

items.q: Can we come in the morning, leave for lunch and come back afterwards?

a.t: No, once you leave you cannot come back in.
Our SNACK BAR offers lunch deals so you can eat on site.

items.q: Birthday parties: how far in advance should we book?

a.t: You can book your birthday party on www.girafou.com.
You can also book your party at the Girafou reception desk.
We recommend booking at least
2 weeks in advance.
From mid-June to mid-September, 11.00am to 7.00pm. The Ouistreham site may close in the event of strong wind or rain.

items.q: Can we leave the children at Girafou and go shopping?

a.t: At Girafou, children must ALWAYS be accompanied by an adult.

items.q: What age can children come to Girafou?

a.t: The equipment at Girafou is for children aged 1 to 12. There is a separate, enclosed and secure play area designed specifically for children aged 1 to 5.
The inflatable games are for children aged 4 to 12. The Grand Labyrinthe is reserved for children aged 4 to 12.

items.q: Can we go on the equipment with the children?

a.t: Yes, depending on how busy it is, and provided you are wearing socks — except on the inflatable structures, which adults may not use.
Access to the equipment remains possible at any time in an emergency.

items.q: Is the park accessible for visitors with reduced mobility?

a.t: For any question about access and facilities for visitors with reduced mobility, please contact us before your visit: we will tell you what is possible for your particular situation.
→ contact@girafou.com

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?

a.t: You
can pay
by cash, card or chèques vacances.
Cheques
are no longer accepted
at Girafou.
→ See the “Birthdays” page

items.q: Holiday clubs, works councils, associations, companies: what tailor-made packages do you offer?

a.t: For “holiday club visits”, special rates are available on Wednesdays and throughout the school holidays. For “works councils”, Girafou offers ticket books as well as bespoke packages for Christmas parties and other events.
Do you have a request or a question about something in particular?
Ask us and we will get back to you as soon as we can.
Ask us a question:
→ Contact us here

planAcces.subtitle: Girafou welcomes you in Bénouville, near Caen. Choose your starting point and follow the directions!
planAcces.mapTitle: Map showing the way to Girafou park

steps: Take the dual carriageway towards Caen.
Then take the first exit you come to (exit “Zone d'activité de Bénouville”).
Girafou is immediately on your left.
Take the ring road towards Ouistreham.
Once on the dual carriageway to Ouistreham, drive about 8 km to the “Zone d'activité de Bénouville” exit.
Follow that road until you reach Girafou.
As you arrive in Bénouville, cross the bridge (Pegasus Bridge).
Carry on to the roundabout and take the first exit on the right towards “St Aubin d'Arquenay”.
Continue straight on, past the church.
Then at the STOP sign turn left, still towards “St Aubin d'Arquenay”.
Take the first left towards “Zone d'activité de Bénouville”.
Girafou is right there on your right!
